have various cats and various shoes, because all of us,

that's another thing that we do.

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Conduct an interview with Irena Milovanovic for a content strategy position at fwd.digital.](https://fathom.video/share/iBaq4LoZ8YiVMaFy2UFBBaGe8yhCxqjN?tab=summary&timestamp=18.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Irena has extensive experience in content strategy, including keyword research, SEO optimization, and AI-assisted content creation](https://fathom.video/share/iBaq4LoZ8YiVMaFy2UFBBaGe8yhCxqjN?tab=summary&timestamp=38.0)
  - [fwd.digital is a rapidly growing startup focusing on AI-generated, high-quality content for diverse clients](https://fathom.video/share/iBaq4LoZ8YiVMaFy2UFBBaGe8yhCxqjN?tab=summary&timestamp=519.0)
  - [The role involves content strategy, client management, and overseeing AI-driven content production](https://fathom.video/share/iBaq4LoZ8YiVMaFy2UFBBaGe8yhCxqjN?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Irena expressed strong interest in the company's AI-driven approach, viewing it as the future of content writing](https://fathom.video/share/iBaq4LoZ8YiVMaFy2UFBBaGe8yhCxqjN?tab=summary&timestamp=946.0)

## Topics

### Irena's Content Strategy Experience

  - [Worked for a German tech company selling modular ERP software](https://fathom.video/share/iBaq4LoZ8YiVMaFy2UFBBaGe8yhCxqjN?tab=summary&timestamp=67.0)
  - [Developed comprehensive content strategy from research to publishing](https://fathom.video/share/iBaq4LoZ8YiVMaFy2UFBBaGe8yhCxqjN?tab=summary&timestamp=100.0)
  - [Conducted competitor analysis and keyword research](https://fathom.video/share/iBaq4LoZ8YiVMaFy2UFBBaGe8yhCxqjN?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Created spreadsheets for keyword targeting and internal linking](https://fathom.video/share/iBaq4LoZ8YiVMaFy2UFBBaGe8yhCxqjN?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Optimized existing content for SEO and coherence](https://fathom.video/share/iBaq4LoZ8YiVMaFy2UFBBaGe8yhCxqjN?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Collaborated with content writers and management](https://fathom.video/share/iBaq4LoZ8YiVMaFy2UFBBaGe8yhCxqjN?tab=summary&timestamp=246.0)

### AI Prompting and Tools Experience

  - [Completed a Coursera course on prompt engineering](https://fathom.video/share/iBaq4LoZ8YiVMaFy2UFBBaGe8yhCxqjN?tab=summary&timestamp=329.0)
  - [Started with Jarvis (now Jasper) for AI-assisted content creation](https://fathom.video/share/iBaq4LoZ8YiVMaFy2UFBBaGe8yhCxqjN?tab=summary&timestamp=355.0)
  - [Transitioned to using ChatGPT and other AI tools](https://fathom.video/share/iBaq4LoZ8YiVMaFy2UFBBaGe8yhCxqjN?tab=summary&timestamp=385.0)
  - [Developed skills in creating accurate prompts and prompt chains](https://fathom.video/share/iBaq4LoZ8YiVMaFy2UFBBaGe8yhCxqjN?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)

### fwd.digital Company Overview

  - [Young startup experiencing rapid growth](https://fathom.video/share/iBaq4LoZ8YiVMaFy2UFBBaGe8yhCxqjN?tab=summary&timestamp=519.0)
  - [Specializes in AI-generated, high-quality content for diverse clients (e.g., Reddit, design agencies, SaaS companies)](https://fathom.video/share/iBaq4LoZ8YiVMaFy2UFBBaGe8yhCxqjN?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Weekly client meetings and content strategy development](https://fathom.video/share/iBaq4LoZ8YiVMaFy2UFBBaGe8yhCxqjN?tab=summary&timestamp=568.0)
  - [Content production includes articles, refreshes, and sometimes image generation](https://fathom.video/share/iBaq4LoZ8YiVMaFy2UFBBaGe8yhCxqjN?tab=summary&timestamp=576.0)
  - [Utilizes a team of freelance writers and AI workflows (AirOps platform)](https://fathom.video/share/iBaq4LoZ8YiVMaFy2UFBBaGe8yhCxqjN?tab=summary&timestamp=603.0)
  - [Focus on minimizing human intervention while maintaining quality](https://fathom.video/share/iBaq4LoZ8YiVMaFy2UFBBaGe8yhCxqjN?tab=summary&timestamp=845.0)

### Role Responsibilities and Expectations

  - [Content strategy development and execution](https://fathom.video/share/iBaq4LoZ8YiVMaFy2UFBBaGe8yhCxqjN?tab=summary&timestamp=568.0)
  - [Client relationship management and weekly meetings](https://fathom.video/share/iBaq4LoZ8YiVMaFy2UFBBaGe8yhCxqjN?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Overseeing AI-generated content production (10 articles + 5 refreshes per week per client)](https://fathom.video/share/iBaq4LoZ8YiVMaFy2UFBBaGe8yhCxqjN?tab=summary&timestamp=793.0)
  - [Reporting on metrics and continuously improving processes](https://fathom.video/share/iBaq4LoZ8YiVMaFy2UFBBaGe8yhCxqjN?tab=summary&timestamp=576.0)
  - [Collaborating with freelance writers and AI workflows](https://fathom.video/share/iBaq4LoZ8YiVMaFy2UFBBaGe8yhCxqjN?tab=summary&timestamp=603.0)
  - [Learning period expected for new hires to familiarize with processes and clients](https://fathom.video/share/iBaq4LoZ8YiVMaFy2UFBBaGe8yhCxqjN?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)

### Editing and Quality Control

  - [Irena noted her lack of experience in editing others' work](https://fathom.video/share/iBaq4LoZ8YiVMaFy2UFBBaGe8yhCxqjN?tab=summary&timestamp=704.0)
  - [Company focuses on minimizing human editing through improved AI workflows](https://fathom.video/share/iBaq4LoZ8YiVMaFy2UFBBaGe8yhCxqjN?tab=summary&timestamp=845.0)
  - [Plans for team training and workshops on editing skills](https://fathom.video/share/iBaq4LoZ8YiVMaFy2UFBBaGe8yhCxqjN?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)

## Next Steps

  - [fwd.digital to review the interview recording and make a hiring decision](https://fathom.video/share/iBaq4LoZ8YiVMaFy2UFBBaGe8yhCxqjN?tab=summary&timestamp=1023.0)
  - [Company to inform Irena of the decision within the week](https://fathom.video/share/iBaq4LoZ8YiVMaFy2UFBBaGe8yhCxqjN?tab=summary&timestamp=1037.0)
  - [If hired, Irena could potentially start in two weeks](https://fathom.video/share/iBaq4LoZ8YiVMaFy2UFBBaGe8yhCxqjN?tab=summary&timestamp=463.0)

action_items.description: Send interview recording to decision-makers for candidate Irena Milovanovic
